specVersion.title: Spec Version
specVersion.description: NexFlow spec version used to interpret the manifest.

id.title: Identifier
id.description: Stable, case-sensitive identifier. It starts with a lowercase letter and uses lowercase letters, digits, and non-empty segments separated by hyphens or underscores.

eventType.title: Event Type
eventType.description: Dotted lowercase event type. Event types are a separate namespace from entity identifiers.

idList.title: Identifier List
idList.description: Unique identifiers or identifier references. The containing field determines the target namespace for references.

eventTypeList.title: Event Type List
eventTypeList.description: Unique references to declared event types.

autonomyLevel.title: Autonomy Level
autonomyLevel.description: Declared level of agent or automation independence. Autonomy does not grant permission.

riskLevel.title: Risk Level
riskLevel.description: Declared risk classification for a capability or operation.

permissionEffect.title: Permission Effect
permissionEffect.description: Policy effect that allows, denies, or requires approval before capability use.

taskStatus.title: Task Status
taskStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a declared task.

handoffStatus.title: Handoff Status
handoffStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a declared handoff.

accessMode.title: Access Mode
accessMode.description: Declared mode for using a context source. Access mode does not grant permission.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: Sensitivity classification for context or memory.

memoryScope.title: Memory Scope
memoryScope.description: Boundary for retaining and reusing information.
